name: ModelsUsage
desc: Menubar launcher + webview dashboard for AI model usage, tabbed per source.
doc: Menubar launcher + webview dashboard for AI model usage. Supports a tab per source: KIX (HTTP /api/usage with bearer auth) and Claude Code (walks ~/.claude/projects/*/*.jsonl session logs). Same date-range + granularity controls apply to whichever tab is active; the dashboard remembers the last-selected tab across reloads.

Variable.name: apiBaseUrl
Variable.desc: Base URL for the usage API.

Variable.name: usagePath
Variable.desc: Relative API path used for usage requests.

Variable.name: defaultGranularity
Variable.desc: Default granularity when none is persisted.

Variable.name: logger
Variable.desc: Logger object used within the Spoon. Set its level (e.g. spoon.ModelsUsage.logger.setLogLevel("debug")) to see request/response traces.

Method.name: configure
Method.desc: Merge configuration values into the spoon.

Method.name: setApiKey
Method.desc: Persist the KIX API key sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>` on every KIX /api/usage HTTP call. Synchronously written to hs.settings so an immediate :start() picks it up.

Method.name: setKeys
Method.desc: Set the list of KIX API key UUIDs the spoon will pass as repeated &key= query parameters on each refresh. Accepts a Lua table of strings or a comma-separated string.

Method.name: setDefaultKey
Method.desc: Backward-compatible single-key setter; wraps the UUID into a one-element KIX keys list. Prefer :setKeys({...}) for new code.

Method.name: setActiveSource
Method.desc: Switch the dashboard tab and the periodic refresh target to the named source. Valid ids: "kix", "claudecode". Invalid ids are ignored.

Method.name: setDateRange
Method.desc: Set date bounds and refresh immediately.

Method.name: refresh
Method.desc: Trigger an asynchronous refresh of the active source (KIX → HTTP, Claude Code → JSONL walk).

Method.name: start
Method.desc: Create menubar item, schedule timer, and fetch data.

Method.name: stop
Method.desc: Stop timer and remove menubar item.
